Paper review about sleep loss & anxiety (Simon et al., 2020)

April 27, 2020

I gave a presentation on the paper “Overanxious and underslept” by Simon et al (2020).

Date: 27 April, 2020
Event: Seminar on Biological Psycholgy, Seoul National University
Location: Seoul, South Korea
Paper: Link
Slides: Download pdf

functional connectivity
